meaning: n.孔,穴,缝隙,(照相机,望远镜等的)光圈,孔径
examples: Through the aperture he could see daylight.
It did not entirely fill the aperture, and he had been looking over it.
The only light came through a narrow aperture.
If it were painting you could say Aperture would show Picasso, and we would show Rembrandt.
The type of image displayed on this page is known as a synthetic aperture radar interferogram.
